series_metadata.series_description: Posts made or approved by the Office of Communications on Social Media sites such as Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn etc. are made to market the agency and share information that is of interest to the citizens of Ohio. This information can include but not be limited to; press releases, photos, videos, events, and general information about the agency and the services we provide. These web pages are maintained by the owners of the sites and not ODM. All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: two months from date posted
